description.zh:
我检查完了U盘上的一切，它包含数字文件以及照片和视频片段。现在正式确认了——Ryba死了。

驾驶员的PMC们审问了他，然后把他干掉了，他们把他关在海关区域，至少我认为是那个地点...仓库看起来很眼熟，我敢发誓我们就在那个 exact 仓库里储存过物资，我想是3号仓库。

我希望你顺便在那里安装一个摄像头，我好奇是否很快会有其他人去调查那个地方。明白你该做什么了吗？别搞砸了，冠军。
description.en:
I finished examining everything which was on the drive, it contained digital documents aswell as photographs and video footage. It's official now - Ryba is dead.

The driver's PMCs interrogated him and then took him out, they held him captive inside the customs zone, at least I think that's the location... The warehouse looks familiar, I could have sworn we stored supplies in that exact warehouse, I think it was warehouse three.

I want you to rig the place with a camera while you're at it, I am curious if anyone else will be investigating that place anytime soon. Understand what you gotta do? Don't mess this up, champion.
